chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الطَّرَّارِ وَ الْمُخْتَلِسِ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 37 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obligated upon the villain and the embezzler

text: أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) أُتِيَ بِرَجُلٍ اخْتَلَسَ دُرَّةً مِنْ أُذُنِ جَارِيَةٍ قَالَ هَذِهِ الدَّغَارَةُ الْمُعْلَنَةُ فَضَرَبَهُ وَ حَبَسَهُ .

en.hubeali: ‘They came with a man to Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> who had picked ear rings from the ears of a girl. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This is open snatching’. So he<sup>asws</sup> whipped him and imprisoned him’.
